name: Quebec Merit Scholarship for Foreign Students (PBEEE)
description: Premier merit scholarship from the Quebec government for outstanding international students pursuing graduate studies.

name: Mitacs Globalink Research Award
description: Supports international research collaborations between Canadian and global institutions. Strong fit for CS/engineering students.

name: McGill Entrance Excellence Award
description: Automatic consideration for high-achieving incoming students at McGill. Based on academic excellence at time of admission.

name: Concordia International Tuition Award
description: Partial tuition waiver for international students demonstrating academic excellence. Renewable annually.

name: Université de Montréal International Excellence Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for incoming international students. French-language institution offering STEM and professional programs.

name: NSERC Undergraduate Student Research Award (USRA)
provider: Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council of Canada
description: Paid research experience at a Canadian university. Connects students with faculty-led research projects. Excellent for CS/software students.

name: RBC Future Launch Scholarship
description: Supports youth in gaining work experience and career skills. Strong focus on leadership and community impact.

name: CIBC Youthvision Scholarship Program
description: For students demonstrating leadership, community service, and financial need. Includes mentorship component.

name: Polytechnique Montréal Excellence Scholarship
description: Top engineering school in Quebec. Scholarship for high-GPA international students in engineering disciplines.

name: FRQNT Graduate Scholarship (B2)
provider: Fonds de recherche du Québec – Nature et technologies
description: Prestigious Quebec government scholarship for STEM graduate students. Covers tuition and living allowance.

name: ÉTS International Excellence Award
description: Strong engineering school with co-op programs. Scholarship specifically for international students in technology fields.

name: Muslim Scholarship Foundation Canada
description: Financial support for Muslim students pursuing post-secondary education in Canada. Includes community mentorship.

name: Association Québec-Maroc Education Grant
description: Dedicated support for Moroccan students in Quebec. Community-driven with networking events and mentorship from established Moroccan-Canadians.

name: TD Scholarship for Community Leadership
description: Most generous private scholarship in Canada. Requires exceptional community leadership and academic achievement.

name: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarship
description: Canada's most prestigious graduate scholarship. Targets world-class doctoral students with leadership potential.
